citations.narrative:
Goat Unit: In Pen #4 where 6 adult and kid goats are currently housed, there is a panel of plywood that has separated
from the fence creating a gap that is wide enough for an animal to get its head or an appendage caught.
Horse Unit: There are 2 horse pens, each housing 4 horses, where an area, approximately 24 inches X12 inches, of
corrugated roof panels covering their shelter structures have torn. In one pen, the roof panel is hanging down into the pen;
in the other, it is not. The facility representative stated this occurred during the heavy winds a month earlier.
Housing facilities that are not structurally sound may cause injury to the animals. The facility must be constructed of such
material and of such strength as appropriate for the animals involved. The indoor and outdoor housing facilities be
structurally sound and shall be maintained in good repair to protect the animals from injury.
To be corrected by February 13, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.125(a) 
   
Facilities, general. 
Goat Unit: In Pen #4 where 6 adult and kid goats are currently housed, there is a panel of plywood that has separated 
from the fence creating a gap that is wide enough for an animal to get its head or an appendage caught.  
Horse Unit: There are 2 horse pens, each housing 4 horses, where an area, approximately 24 inches X12 inches, of 
corrugated roof panels covering their shelter structures have torn. In one pen, the roof panel is hanging down into the pen; 
in the other, it is not. The facility representative stated this occurred during the heavy winds a month earlier.  
Housing facilities that are not structurally sound may cause injury to the animals. The facility must be constructed of such 
material and of such strength as appropriate for the animals involved. The indoor and outdoor housing facilities be 
structurally sound and shall be maintained in good repair to protect the animals from injury. 
To be corrected by February 13, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
 n
